nodes.name: Webhook Regenerar
nodes.notes:
POST /imagens/regenerar { video_id }
Disparado pelo frontend.

nodes.name: Ler Cenas Pendentes
nodes.notes: GET cenas pendentes (imagem_status='pendente'), ordem ASC.

nodes.name: Contar e Responder
nodes.notes: Conta pendentes e prepara resposta.

nodes.name: Responder Webhook
nodes.notes: Responde imediatamente ao frontend. Processamento continua async.

nodes.name: Separar Cenas
nodes.notes: Separa cenas com nota_correcao (Claude reescreve) vs sem (gera direto).

nodes.name: Anthropic Chat Model
nodes.notes: Sonnet 4.5, 8192 tokens, temp 0.5.

nodes.name: Claude Corretor
nodes.notes: Claude reescreve prompts FLUX baseado nas notas de correção.

nodes.name: Parse e Atualizar Prompts
nodes.notes:
Parseia prompts corrigidos do Claude e atualiza no Supabase.
Limpa nota_correcao após aplicar.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: '{ myself { pods { id name desiredStatus runtime { uptimeInSeconds } } } }' }) }}

nodes.name: Verificar Pod Existente
nodes.notes: Lista todos os pods do RunPod para verificar se clay-comfyui já está rodando.

nodes.name: Avaliar Pod Existente
nodes.notes:
Verifica se pod clay-comfyui existe e está RUNNING.
Se sim, reutiliza. Se não, cria novo.

nodes.name: Usar Pod Existente
nodes.notes: Pod já está rodando, vai direto para check do ComfyUI.

parameters.jsCode:
var staticData = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');
return [{ json: { podStatusBody: { query: '{ pod(input: {podId: "' + staticData.podId + '"}) { id desiredStatus runtime { uptimeInSeconds } } }' } } }];

var staticData = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');
return [{ json: { checkUrl: staticData.comfyuiUrl + '/object_info' } }];

var staticData = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');
return [{ json: { stopBody: { query: 'mutation { podTerminate(input: {podId: "' + (staticData.podId || '') + '"}) }' } } }];

nodes.name: Preparar Geração
nodes.notes: Re-lê cenas pendentes (prompts podem ter sido corrigidos pelo Claude).

parameters.jsCode:
var staticData = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');
return [{ json: { historyUrl: staticData.imgHistoryUrl, promptId: staticData.imgPromptId } }];

nodes.name: Baixar Imagem
nodes.notes: GET imagem do ComfyUI como binary.

nodes.name: Upload Supabase Storage
nodes.notes: Upload imagem para Supabase Storage bucket imagens.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ imagem_url: $('Prep Download').first().json.publicUrl, imagem_status: 'gerada', video_status: 'pendente', video_url: null }) }}

nodes.name: Atualizar Cena
nodes.notes: PATCH cena: imagem_url + imagem_status='gerada'.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { _consolidado: true } }];

nodes.name: Consolidar
nodes.notes: Volta para Loop Cenas.

parameters.jsCode:
var staticData = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');
return [{ json: { stopBody: { query: 'mutation { podTerminate(input: {podId: "' + (staticData.podId || '') + '"}) }' } } }];

nodes.name: Copiar Output → Input
nodes.notes:
REGRA 29 — Continuidade visual.
Copia o PNG gerado de /output/ para /input/ do ComfyUI como continuity_{videoId}.png, para a próxima cena usar como referência Redux.
Só roda se personagem_presente && !_isThumbnail.
Seta staticData.lastPersonagemImage com o nome do arquivo em /input/.

cenasSemNota.narracao: Ele olhou no espelho. E o reflexo já não o seguia.
cenasSemNota.visual: Same basement — different angle. Clay standing before a cracked mirror on the wall, his reflection visible but slightly off, the sculpture sitting on table in background now fully detailed with eyes and face, Clay's own face appears somehow less defined than before
cenasSemNota.movimento: Clay leans closer to mirror slowly, hand reaches toward reflection
cenasSemNota.iluminacao: Low Key Chiaroscuro, single 60W tungsten bulb 3200K hanging overhead, harsh shadows with cooler temperature shift, mirror reflecting light creating secondary source 3500K, minimal fill light from basement window, subject well lit with visible clay textures
cenasSemNota.foreground: Blurred corner of cracked mirror frame with chipped paint texture and aged patina, extreme surface detail
cenasSemNota.midground: Cracked mirror mounted on basement wall showing Clay's reflection slightly offset from his actual position, scattered clay shavings with organic texture, three worn metal sculpting tools with patina and rust spots, small water bowl with ripples, completed sculpture on wooden table with fully detailed face including eyes and curved mouth
cenasSemNota.background: Soft bokeh of dim basement walls with peeling paint texture, blurred wooden shelves with dusty jars, creamy out-of-focus hanging bulb creating warm glow halo
cenasSemNota.paleta_cores: Cooler amber shifting to 3500K, steel grey mirror tones, muted terracotta clay, deep charcoal shadows, desaturated horror palette
cenasSemNota.prompt_flux: claymation_stoners, stop motion photography, miniature set photography, Canon C500 Mark II, macro lens, Cooke Speed Panchro vintage 50mm, 9:16 vertical frame, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, visible clay textures, plasticine texture, handmade imperfections, Kodak Vision3 500T emulation, medium film grain, subtle halation, organic texture, NO TEXT, NO WATERMARK, NO LOGO, NO PLASTIC HDR, NO OVERSHARPEN, NO DUPLICATE CLAY, NO TWO STANDING CLAY FIGURES, NO THREE FIGURES, only ONE living Clay character in the scene plus his reflection inside the mirror, NO HANDS RAISED, NO HAND IN FOREGROUND, NO RAINDROPS, NO WATER ON MIRROR, NO BROKEN GLASS, NO CRACKED MIRROR, NO SHATTERED GLASS, the mirror surface is clean and intact, single character only, one clay figure, ANGLE: Medium Shot side profile view, eye level, f/2.8, camera positioned to the side capturing both Clay in profile on the left side of the frame and the wall mirror on the right side of the frame in the same shot side by side, Clay is facing right toward the mirror, the mirror is hanging on the wall to his right, both visible in the same frame from a side angle. SUBJECT: ONE single Clay character standing in profile on the left side of the frame facing the mirror to his right, thin man with spiky dark brown hair, large curved mustache, deep set eyes with heavy dark circles, white shirt and suspenders, his arms hanging at his sides, his face seen in profile from the side staring quietly at the mirror, only his profile silhouette visible. To the right of him on the wall is a clean intact rectangular mirror with a wooden frame, inside the mirror his REFLECTION is visible from the front showing his complete face — the same thin man with spiky dark brown hair, large curved mustache, deep set eyes, white shirt and suspenders, the reflection facing the viewer, with a NEUTRAL expression, lips closed, eyes looking directly forward at the viewer, every clay fingerprint visible. CRITICAL: there is only ONE living Clay character in the room (in profile on the left), and his REFLECTION inside the mirror on the right — these are not two separate people, the reflection is just an image inside the glass. LIGHT: warm 3200K tungsten key light from a basement bulb creating dim domestic warmth on Clay in profile and matching warm light on his reflection inside the mirror, soft fill, gentle shadows, well lit subjects with visible clay textures. FOREGROUND: clean basement floor visible in soft focus with warm bokeh. MIDGROUND: Clay standing in profile on the left side facing right, and the wall mirror on the right side showing his reflection facing forward, both clearly visible side by side in the same frame. BACKGROUND: dim basement around them — peeling paint walls, edge of furniture in soft bokeh, warm bulb glow creating amber halo, creamy out-of-focus background. COLOR: warm amber tungsten ambient light, natural clay flesh tones on Clay and his reflection, white shirt and dark suspenders, brown hair and mustache, dim basement palette, desaturated horror palette
cenasSemNota.prompt_movimento_wan: Clay standing in profile on the left side of the frame remains completely still throughout the entire shot, motionless, frozen in place, his profile silhouette unchanging. Inside the mirror on the right, his reflection slowly turns its head sideways to its left looking away from where Clay is standing, breaking the rules of mirroring by acting independently, the reflection's head rotation is slow and continuous and deliberate, only the head moves while the body stays still, the reflection clearly turning away from the viewer's direction. Continuous slow head rotation from the reflection only, Clay completely frozen, no camera movement, static shot.
